turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, my husband had an appendix operation at your clinic four days back and he's been having some swelling near the wound. I'm not sure if it's normal or not.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand that must be worrying. What's the patient's name?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ms. Joshi, post-operative wound queries really need to be assessed by the treating surgeon or our nursing staff, as I wouldn't be in a position to advise medically on this. I don't want to give you incorrect information about something this sensitive. Let me transfer you to our post-operative care team right away — they'll be able to tell you if this requires attention.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes please, I've been worried since morning.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Completely understandable. Connecting you now to our ward staff. Please hold the line.
